name: Gingerbread Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening with the sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Incorporate the molasses and sour cream.
4. Combine the remaining ingredients and mix them into the sour cream mixture.
5. Stir until just moistened and no flour streaks remain.
6. Fill muffin tins coated with non-stick spray to about 1/2 full with the batter.
7. Bake at 375 degrees F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until done.
8. Serve warm.
